title: Export Request Message
description: Validation schema for sensitive data export requests via RabbitMQ.

jwtToken.description: The JWT bearer token for authorization.

fileId.description: Unique identifier for the specific file.

publicKey.description: The encryption public key in Crypt4GH or PEM format.

startCoordinate.description: The starting byte offset for the export.

endCoordinate.description: The ending byte offset for the export.
